# Open Design Guard

Open Design Guard is a hosted remote MCP for agent design system guard MCP.

Website: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: agent design system guard MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.opendesignguard/opendesignguard-mcp
Tools: check_design_guard, explain_design_gap, issue_design_receipt, suggest_agent_fix, export_design_audit

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
